nodes.label: lo-core
nodes.summary: LO / Logic Omni language package, examples, schemas and prototype CLI.

nodes.label: lo-compiler
nodes.summary: LO compiler pipeline contracts for parsing, checking, IR, diagnostics and reports.

nodes.label: lo-runtime
nodes.summary: LO execution engine contracts for checked and compiled runtime execution.

nodes.label: lo-security
nodes.summary: Reusable LO security primitives, redaction helpers, permission models and security report contracts.

nodes.label: lo-config
nodes.summary: LO project configuration, environment mode and policy loading contracts.

nodes.label: lo-reports
nodes.summary: Shared LO report schemas and report-writing contracts.

nodes.label: lo-logic
nodes.summary: LO multi-state logic concepts including Tri, Logic<N> and future Omni logic.

nodes.label: lo-vector
nodes.summary: LO vector value, lane, operation and report concepts.

nodes.label: lo-compute
nodes.summary: LO compute planning, capability and target selection concepts.

nodes.label: lo-ai
nodes.summary: LO AI inference contracts, model metadata, safety policy and reports.

nodes.label: lo-lowbit-ai
nodes.summary: LO low-bit AI inference contracts with BitNet as an optional backend.

nodes.label: lo-agent
nodes.summary: LO supervised AI agent, tool permission, task group and report contracts.

nodes.label: lo-neural
nodes.summary: LO neural network model, layer, inference and training boundary contracts.

nodes.label: lo-neuromorphic
nodes.summary: LO neuromorphic and spiking event model contracts.

nodes.label: lo-photonic
nodes.summary: LO photonic and wavelength hardware concepts and target mapping.

nodes.label: lo-target-cpu
nodes.summary: LO CPU target capability, fallback and execution planning contracts.

nodes.label: lo-cpu-kernels
nodes.summary: LO optimized CPU kernel contracts for scalar, vector, matrix and low-bit workloads.

nodes.label: lo-target-binary
nodes.summary: LO binary and native target planning concepts.

nodes.label: lo-target-wasm
nodes.summary: LO WebAssembly target planning and output contracts.

nodes.label: lo-target-gpu
nodes.summary: LO GPU target planning and output contracts.

nodes.label: lo-target-ai-accelerator
nodes.summary: LO NPU, TPU and AI accelerator target planning contracts.

nodes.label: lo-target-photonic
nodes.summary: LO photonic target backend planning concepts.

nodes.label: lo-app-kernel
nodes.summary: Optional LO secure runtime kernel design for typed APIs, validation, auth, workload controls, jobs and reports.

nodes.label: lo-api-server
nodes.summary: `lo-api-server` is the first concrete HTTP API-serving package for LO.

nodes.label: lo-cli
nodes.summary: LO developer command-line interface for checking, building, serving, reporting and running safe tasks.

nodes.label: lo-tasks
nodes.summary: Safe typed task runner for LO project automation.

nodes.label: lo-benchmark
nodes.summary: LO benchmark and diagnostics contracts for logic, compute targets, fallback behaviour and safe reporting.

nodes.label: lo-project-graph
nodes.summary: LO project knowledge graph contracts for package, document, policy and report relationships.

nodes.label: app
nodes.summary: `packages/app` is the bespoke application package for this workspace.
